chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D – 1399 of 2016. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.02.2018. FOR KATCHA PESHI. Mr. Raja Hans Raj Naurang, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. Syed Meeral Shah Bukhari, A.P.G. -------- Learned A.A.G. files parawise comments of respondent No.10 which are taken on record. Copy whereof has been supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner who after going through the same does not press this petition which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.
